purpose: Monitor commodity-currency FX positioning opportunities by tracking alignment between terms-of-trade changes and rate differential changes
components: Binary sign of ΔToT (commodity terms of trade change direction)
Binary sign of Δrate differential (rate spread change direction)
March 2026 readings: JPY/EUR aligned bullish, NOK/AUD aligned bearish, CAD conflicting
Historical validation showing 2-3x larger FX moves during aligned concordance
current_assessment: Provides useful directional signal with specific current readings. Aligned concordance historically coincided with 2-3x larger FX moves. Binary construction needs augmentation with magnitude information and formal backtesting.
limitations: Not formally backtested with transaction costs
Biofuel-energy-agriculture linkage (WTI-corn r=0.55-0.65) is a blind spot
